locations.name: Winterfell
locations.description: Ancient seat of House Stark, fortress of the North.

locations.name: The Wall
locations.description: A colossal wall of ice guarding the realms of men.

locations.name: King's Landing
locations.description: Capital of the Seven Kingdoms and seat of the Iron Throne.

locations.name: Dragonstone
locations.description: Ancestral island seat of House Targaryen.

locations.name: Casterly Rock
locations.description: Stronghold of House Lannister, carved into the coastal rock.

locations.name: Highgarden
locations.description: Garden capital of the Reach, seat of House Tyrell.

locations.name: Sunspear
locations.description: Sun-baked capital of Dorne, seat of House Martell.

locations.name: Braavos
locations.description: A proud free city across the narrow sea.

locations.name: Pentos
locations.description: The free city closest to Westeros' shores.

locations.name: Volantis
locations.description: Oldest and once-mightiest of the Free Cities.

locations.name: Meereen
locations.description: A great city of Slaver's Bay.

locations.name: Vaes Dothrak
locations.description: The sacred city of the Dothraki horselords.
